title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: INUKAI CLUB HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing daily physical activity, teaching good nutrition, and helping to develop healthy relationships. 560 SE 3rd Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Fall Hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-7pm Summer Hours: Varies by service (503) 640-4558 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 640-4558 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Monthly sliding scale membership based on income. Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEALS MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY CLOSET SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
